summary: Completed testing of Bonus Points System for Delivery Drivers. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI components verified - DriverPenaltyPoints shows 100/100 points with 'ممتاز' excellent message when at max points.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: BONUS_POINTS constants defined correctly (five_star_rating=5, ten_deliveries=10, challenge_complete=15)
✅ Backend: MAX_PENALTY_POINTS cap is 100
✅ Backend: GET /api/delivery/my-penalty-points returns history with bonus entries
✅ Backend: Bonus history structure includes type='bonus', bonus_type, points_added, reason
✅ Backend: POST /api/delivery/rate/{order_id} endpoint exists
✅ Backend: Rate delivery requires authentication (401)
✅ Backend: Rating validation (1-5 range) works
✅ Backend: GET /api/delivery/check-rating/{order_id} endpoint exists
✅ Backend: POST /api/delivery/orders/{order_id}/deliver endpoint exists
✅ Backend: Deliver endpoint restricted to delivery drivers (403 for customer)
✅ Backend: GET /api/delivery/stats includes total_delivered count for milestone tracking
✅ Backend: my-penalty-points API supports mixed history (bonuses + deductions)
✅ Backend: Delivery driver can view their penalty points (200)
✅ Backend: GET /api/delivery/performance endpoint works
✅ Backend: GET /api/delivery/my-ratings endpoint works
✅ Frontend: Login as delivery driver successful
✅ Frontend: DriverPenaltyPoints component shows 'نقاط السلوك' section
✅ Frontend: Points display shows 100/100 with green progress bar
✅ Frontend: 'ممتاز' excellent message displayed when at max points
✅ Frontend: Bonus tips message hidden when at max (correct behavior per code)
critical_code_review_comments: add_bonus_points() correctly implements: get current points, calculate new (capped at 100), update DB, push to penalty_history with type='bonus'
rate_delivery_driver() correctly calls add_bonus_points('five_star_rating') when rating == 5
mark_order_delivered() correctly calls check_delivery_milestone_bonus() after each delivery
check_delivery_milestone_bonus() tracks last_delivery_milestone and adds bonus every 10 deliveries
DriverPenaltyPoints.js correctly separates history by type (bonus vs deduction) and shows appropriate icons (TrendingUp for bonus, TrendingDown for deduction)
Bonus tips message correctly hidden when points are at max (100)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing delivery driver 'فهد المندوب' with 100 penalty points
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bonus Points System fully tested and working. Key features: 1) BONUS_POINTS dict defines values (five_star_rating=5, ten_deliveries=10, challenge_complete=15), 2) add_bonus_points() adds points capped at MAX_PENALTY_POINTS=100, 3) rate_delivery_driver() adds +5 when rating==5, 4) check_delivery_milestone_bonus() adds +10 every 10 deliveries, 5) penalty_history stores both bonuses (type='bonus') and deductions, 6) DriverPenaltyPoints.js displays both with appropriate icons and colors.

my_penalty_points.returns: current_points, max_points, percentage, history (includes both bonus and deduction entries)

bonus_triggers.ten_deliveries: Called in check_delivery_milestone_bonus() after every delivery

features: Excellent message when at max points
Bonus tips when points below max
History with TrendingUp icon for bonuses, TrendingDown for deductions
